ActionSpace.description: A curated environment of tools accessible to an agent or node.

AnyStateEvent.description: A discriminated union of state events.

AnyTopology.description: A discriminated union of workflow topologies.

type.description: Discriminator type for a belief update event.

hypothesis.description: The baseline steady state hypothesis being tested.

severity.description: Severity level if the rule is violated.

CouncilTopology.description: A Council workflow topology involving multiple voting members and an adjudicator.

diversity_policy.description: Constraints enforcing cognitive heterogeneity across the council.

backpressure.description: Declarative backpressure constraints for the graph edges.

salience.description: The importance profile used for memory pruning.
